videos.title: POV: you asked him to take a 'candid' photo 📸💀
videos.hook_style: Text on screen with a trending sped-up song
videos.visual_signature: Shaky camera, zooming in on awkward poses

videos.title: GRWM while I tell you about the worst date of my life 🚩
videos.hook_style: I literally had to fake an emergency, listen to this.
videos.visual_signature: Ring light, applying makeup close to the camera

videos.title: 3 iPhone settings you NEED to turn off right now 🛑📱
videos.hook_style: If you value your privacy, turn these three settings off immediately.
videos.visual_signature: Screen recording overlaid with a green-screen talking head
videos.audio_style: Fast-paced voiceover with subtle lo-fi background beat

videos.title: Making the viral chopped Italian sandwich 🥪🔥
videos.hook_style: ASMR knife chopping sound followed by Let's make the sandwich everyone is talking about.
videos.visual_signature: Overhead shot, quick cuts on every ingredient chop
videos.audio_style: ASMR food sounds mixed with a trending hip-hop instrumental

videos.title: When your boss says 'we are a family here' 🚩💼
videos.hook_style: Staring blankly into the camera while wearing a cheap wig
videos.visual_signature: Jump cuts between two characters played by the same person in different outfits
videos.audio_style: Awkward silence, exaggerated typing sounds, sarcastic tone

videos.title: Gym girls will understand 😭🍑
videos.hook_style: Why does the hip thrust machine always look at me like that?
videos.visual_signature: Gym mirror selfie angle, text overlay tracking the movement

videos.title: Spend a slow Sunday with me in NYC ☕️🗽
videos.visual_signature: Warm color grading, cinematic b-roll, soft focus
videos.audio_style: Indie folk song, soft ambient noise

videos.title: We need to talk about the Met Gala looks... 👗👀
videos.hook_style: I am so sorry but who approved this outfit?
videos.visual_signature: Green screen background showing celebrity photos, rapid zooming

videos.title: How I made $5k this month doing literally nothing 💸
videos.hook_style: Pointing at a screenshot of a bank account balance
videos.visual_signature: High contrast text, pointing at floating graphics

videos.title: Books that absolutely destroyed me emotionally 📚💔
videos.hook_style: Holding a stack of books and dropping them on a bed
videos.visual_signature: Cozy bedroom background, holding up books to the camera

videos.title: Asking strangers what song they are listening to 🎧🚶‍♂️
videos.hook_style: Running up to a person wearing headphones on the street
videos.visual_signature: Handheld microphone, dynamic tracking shots of pedestrians
videos.audio_style: Live street audio transitioning into the song the person names

videos.title: Why you've been drinking water WRONG 💧🤯
videos.hook_style: Stop scrolling! If you chug water like this, you are dehydrating yourself.
videos.visual_signature: Whiteboard animations mixed with direct-to-camera speaking
videos.audio_style: Crisp voiceover with subtle sound effects
